section.heading: Expenditure of funds for administration of Trust Territory of the Pacific Islands

content.p: After June 30, 1954, no funds appropriated by any Act and no funds which are available or which may become available from any source whatever shall be used for administration of the Trust Territory of the Pacific Islands, except as may be specifically authorized by law.

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Section was formerly classified to section 1437 of this title.
Section is from the Interior Department Appropriation Act, 1954, act July 31, 1953.

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: Similar provisions were contained in the Interior Department Appropriation Act, 1953, act July 9, 1952, ch. 597, title I, 66 Stat. 458.
